audio_identity.overall_style: side-scrolling action game with varied gameplay perspectives requiring dynamic audio cues
distinctive_elements: multi-stage audio design supporting jungle exploration, first-person tunnel combat, bunker siege, and third-person jungle sequences
sound effects praised in reviews as a strong element of the game

sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor Platoon (NES) article
notes: Documentation available is limited to composer credit and mention of unused 'Intermission' track. No detailed track-by-track analysis, tempo, key, chord progression, or specific SFX characteristics documented in provided sources. Game features four distinct stages with different audio requirements (jungle, first-person tunnel, bunker siege, third-person jungle) but musical parameters remain undocumented.
